wikitext:
[]: Quickening and ? [NO SPOILERS] Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 14, 2009 8:53 pm I'm guessing nobody knows when 3.0+4.0 are going to be coming out, but I thought I'd ask anyways and hope. :hopeful: I was going to put this in the 2.0 thread, but this about the last 2 episodes/films and I didnt want my last strike But If anyone has heard anything or knows anything please feel free to post here.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 14, 2009 8:57 pm It'll probably be ready in the next two to four years from now. If Khara can meet a deadline. No official date has been confirmed as of yet.

[]: Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 14, 2009 9:00 pm http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6962 Last thread on the matter. Question was unanswerable, and thread was locked. Now this one is, too. Please search for a preexisting thread next time.
